text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I hated the sound of glass cracking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No matter when I hear it, the echo stirs my
memories... Sharply and coldly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: This is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (My home... but something's not right...)
Why?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (That's...)

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Why?! Why are my legs... the only ones... like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Oh... I'm dreaming... of the day I first was
confronted with my body's limits...)

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: Lady Ardan. Might you like to paint a picture?

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. There's a nice view of the park from here. I
think that scenery might be nice to capture...

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous... You have such wonderful skill with a
brush.

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I have your teachings on tastefulness to thank,
Nanny. You taught me a lot when I was staying in
the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Do you think those children playing outside are
around my age?

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They look like they're having a wonderful time
running about. It's as if... they're bathed in light.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: My lady...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(At that age, the sight of other Umamusume
running freely about outside was almost
blindingly bright to me... It was like looking out
onto another world entirely...)

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: Dear sister... Can her legs really hold out?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She'll be all right, Lady Ardan. Please, have faith
in Lady Ramonu and watch.

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall try...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ramonu
text_block_list.text: Hm!

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's amazing! Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Family Trainer
text_block_list.text:
What you're seeing is the result of incredible
recovery and growth. At this rate, I doubt her legs
will be giving her any trouble at all by the time
she enters Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: Sister—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(After that, my sister went on to overcome the
weakness she was born with, and successfully
entered Tracen Academy.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(And then, she completed the very first Triple
Tiara in recorded history...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(It was Mejiro Ramonu, the crown jewel of our
family, who carved the Mejiro name into the
annals of history.)

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: She's so radiant...

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text: I... I could do that, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I saw her blossom into blindingly bright
perfection... and I clung to hope.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Nanny. I cannot thank you enough for lending
your voice to convince my parents.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your efforts, I, like my dear sister, am
able to attend Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
...All I did was accompany you, Lady Ardan. What
truly swayed their hearts was your unyielding
resolve.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
But remember, my lady, the path you have chosen
is the steepest, most strenuous of all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am well aware. ...And yet, I have neither the
slightest regret nor fear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The only one who can make me shine... is me. So
I've made my decision. The turf will be the stage I
dedicate my life to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...That's right. My feelings since haven't changed
in the slightest.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (And they never will.)

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan! ...Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I'm quite fine. I just felt a small twinge in my leg,
nothing more. I'm not in any pain, so I'm perfectly
capable of continuing.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...You really mustn't push yourself too hard. You
might feel all right now, but you'll suffer the
consequences later. Please head to the infirmary
and have yourself examined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Very well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Must I be hospitalized again?

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid so. It's nothing as serious as a full
fracture or a sprain, but your bones and muscles
are currently very fatigued and vulnerable to
further injury.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
This is partially down to your going all out... Your
dramatic growth is putting a great deal of stress
on your legs, my lady.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...To put it simply, are you suggesting I should
rest my legs at the hospital for now?

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. Rushing things now could prove
disastrous, my lady.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text: The good news is that your legs are steadily getting stronger. It'll be a long process... but you will grow into that strength someday, I guarantee it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Very well.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text:
Please, my lady, take care of yourself. I can't
think of a single good reason for you to be risking
your life so soon.

text_block_list.name: Nanny
text_block_list.text: ...I implore you to remember those words you yourself once said to me. The moment you're waiting for will come, so until then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Nanny...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(After that, although I was a registered student at
the academy, I found myself in and out of
hospital many more times...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(With my body unable to endure the level of
strength training that would leave me satisfied,
every day was a living testament to my own
inadequacy. Wasted time slipped away from
me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I felt as if I were shivering away through an
endless winter, yearning for spring to come... My
legs and my heart started to freeze over.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(But at the last possible moment... the blizzard
finally started to let up.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I wish to leave a trail that proves I lived, and I wish to leave it now, in this moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Can I depend on your guidance, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(At last, my one and only chance to compete in
the tryouts arrived. There, I encountered
someone who recognized my determination and
swore to walk this path beside me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(At that moment, I truly felt as if the story of my
life had begun.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I spent so long dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (And yet, the dream goes on...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for Mejiro Ardan and
me to take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determination is tougher than tempered
steel. While steeling myself in an effort to support
that resolve, I head to the track to start today's
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: —Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Perhaps it's due to the dream I had last night,
but I'm quite eager for the Twinkle Series to get
underway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
With your permission, I'd like to begin the
morning training session right away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Thank you. Well then, let's begin
immediately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Isn't that Mejiro Ardan?! The sun's barely
up and she's going all out...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
She just got a trainer after all this time, right?
Still... I sure hope she doesn't wind up back in the
hospital after pushing herself so hard like that.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
But with her sister being such a legend and all, I
guess she's got no choice but to work really hard,
y'know? To catch up?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text: ...That's gotta be rough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The girls in the gallery are watching Mejiro Ardan
train, but... it's almost like they pity her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I doubt they have anything against her, and I'm
sure Mejiro Ardan has been on the receiving end
of oblivious stares plenty of times before, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's the final set complete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without batting an eyelid at the crowd's gaze,
Mejiro Ardan continues her training regimen. She
won't let a single second go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Which means, as her trainer, I can't afford to
waste a single second either!
choice_data_list:
How about we take a break and decide on our
goals?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Goals? Well, I have but one objective.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to commit myself completely to my
debut race. For the moment, I believe that's all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I understand what you wish to say. Doing my
best in the debut is more of an expectation than a
"goal"—and you wanted to hear a long-term
dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
However... as I've previously stated, my body
could give out at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such, my goal is to give the battle before me
all I have to offer. And that's how I wish to leave
my mark on the world—by living always for the
moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I hope that... you can find a way to understand
that.
choice_data_list: I do. Let's make your debut one in a million.
I do. Let's make your debut one in a million.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I am Mejiro Ardan's trainer. If I'm not respecting
her wishes, I'm not fulfilling my duty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, Trainer. Your words are reassuring
indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Once again... I humbly request your guidance in
my future endeavors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins our campaign, with Mejiro Ardan
and I readying for battle!
